message:
🐛 Wrap localStorage calls in try/catch for private browsing safety (#2522)

Replace bare localStorage.getItem/setItem calls in CardRecommendations
and MissionSuggestions with safeGetItem/safeSetItem from the existing
localStorage utility. The other 5 files listed in the issue already had
try/catch protection.

Fixes #2392

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
